section1.title: 1. Data Controller
section1.content: The data controller for this application is SoluctionTree, registered under CNPJ (pending), headquartered in Erechim/RS, Brazil. For questions about this policy, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at: soluctiontree@gmail.com.

section2.title: 2. Legal Bases for Processing
section2.content: Your personal data is processed based on: (a) Consent (Art. 7, I of LGPD) - when you accept our terms and policies; (b) Contract execution (Art. 7, V) - to provide the requested services; (c) Legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX) - to improve our services and ensure platform security.

section3.title: 3. Data Collected
section3.content: We collect the following personal data: name, email, CPF, phone, address, medical history, and treatment information. Sensitive data (CPF, phone, email, medical history, address) is encrypted using AES-256-GCM. We use localStorage for authentication tokens and user preferences.

section4.title: 4. Purpose of Processing
section4.content: Your personal data is used exclusively for: patient management, treatment scheduling, session recording, financial control, and communication related to your treatments. We do not make automated decisions based on your data.

section5.title: 5. Data Protection
section5.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, or disclosure. Sensitive data such as CPF, phone, email, medical history, and address are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

section6.title: 6. Data Sharing
section6.content: Your data will not be shared with third parties without your explicit consent, except when required by law or necessary for the operation of the service. We do not perform international data transfers.

section7.title: 7. Your Rights (Art. 18 of LGPD)
section7.content: In accordance with the LGPD, you have the right to: (I) confirm the existence of processing; (II) access your data; (III) correct incomplete or outdated data; (IV) anonymize, block, or delete unnecessary data; (V) data portability; (VI) delete data processed with consent; (VII) obtain information about sharing; (VIII) revoke consent. To exercise your rights, access your account settings or contact us.

section8.title: 8. Security Incidents
section8.content: In case of a security incident that may pose risk or relevant harm to data subjects, we will notify the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) and affected data subjects, as per Art. 48 of LGPD.

section9.title: 9. Data Retention
section9.content: Your data will be retained as long as your account is active or as necessary to provide the service. After account deletion, data will be eliminated from our systems within 30 days, except when required by law.

section10.title: 10. Contact
section10.content: For questions about this policy or to exercise your rights, contact us: Email: soluctiontree@gmail.com | DPO: soluctiontree@gmail.com | WhatsApp: (54) 99999-7564

section1.title: 1. Acceptance
section1.content: By using FisioTrack, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any of the terms, please do not use the application.

section2.title: 2. Service Description
section2.content: FisioTrack is a physiotherapy management platform that provides tools for patient management, treatment control, session recording, and financial management.

section3.title: 3. User Responsibilities
section3.content: You are responsible for: maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials, all activities that occur under your account, and the accuracy of the data you provide.

section4.title: 4. Prohibited Uses
section4.content: You agree not to: use the service for illegal purposes, attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts, distribute malware, or perform actions that may damage the service.

section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
section5.content: FisioTrack shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.

section1.title: 1. Consent for Data Processing
section1.content: By accepting these terms, you consent to the processing of your personal data as described in our Privacy Policy. This consent is free, informed, and unambiguous.

section2.title: 2. Scope of Consent
section2.content: Your consent covers: collection, storage, processing, and sharing of data necessary for the operation of the physiotherapy management service.

section3.title: 3. Withdrawal of Consent
section3.content: You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting our support team. The withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.

section4.title: 4. Data Retention
section4.content: Your data will be retained for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.content: For questions about this consent or to exercise your rights under the LGPD, contact us at contato@fisiotrack.com.

lgpd.exportDescription: Your data will be exported in JSON format.
lgpd.revokeDescription: This will revoke your consent for all documents. You will need to consent again to use the system.
